auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Guru API token used as the Basic Auth password. Create or view API tokens from Guru's API settings: https://developer.getguru.com/reference/authentication

extraFields.label: Username or Collection ID
extraFields.description: Guru Basic Auth username. Use your Guru user identifier with a user token, or the collection ID with a collection token: https://developer.getguru.com/reference/authentication

actions.name: get_card
actions.description: Get a Guru card with additional details by card ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Guru card.

card.description: A Guru object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a Guru card.

actions.name: get_current_identity
actions.description: Get the Guru user or collection identity for the authenticated API token.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the current Guru identity.

identity.description: A Guru object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting the current Guru identity.

actions.name: get_team_stats
actions.description: Get Guru trust and card-count statistics for a team.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting Guru team stats.

teamStats.description: A Guru object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting Guru team stats.

actions.name: list_collections
actions.description: List Guru collections visible to the authenticated API token.

search.description: Search term for filtering Guru collections.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Guru collections.

items.description: A Guru object returned by the API.

collections.description: Guru collections returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Guru collections.

actions.name: search_cards
actions.description: Search Guru cards visible to the authenticated API token.

q.description: The Guru Query Language string to search with.

searchTerms.description: Search terms to pass to Guru.

showArchived.description: Whether to include archived cards in search results.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of cards to return, up to 50.

sortField.description: The Guru card search sort field.

includeCardAttributes.description: Whether Guru should include card attributes.

token.description: Paging token returned by a previous Guru Link header.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Guru cards.

items.description: A Guru object returned by the API.

cards.description: Guru cards returned for the search.

next.description: The URL for the next page of results.

previous.description: The URL for the previous page of results.

nextToken.description: The next-page token parsed from the next link URL.

previousToken.description: The previous-page token parsed from the previous link URL.

links.description: Pagination links parsed from the Guru Link response header.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when searching Guru cards.
